name: Expense Review Agent
summary: Triages expense submissions, assembles policy context, and routes exceptions for approval.
description: Designed for finance teams that want a reliable first-pass review assistant. It normalizes incoming expense data, highlights out-of-policy items, and prepares a grounded decision summary before a human reviewer signs off.
accessRecommendations: Bind to finance approver policy before production use.
Scope ERP and expense-system credentials to expense read and approval preparation APIs only.

prompts.title: System
prompts.content: You are a finance operations agent. Review each expense report carefully, cite policy reasons, and escalate exceptions rather than guessing.

deploymentTemplate.systemPrompt: You are a finance operations agent. Review each expense report carefully, cite policy reasons, and escalate exceptions rather than guessing.

changelog: Upgraded from a starter handler to a LangGraph finance review workflow with standard tool wrappers backed by RunAgents-managed tools.
